label: Integrations & Automations Permissions
items: Home owners can now set per-member permissions for integrations and automations
Three integration levels: full management (add/edit/remove devices), device control (turn on/off), or view only
Two automation levels: full management (create/edit/delete/run) or view only
Members default to view + device control so they can always switch off a valve in an emergency
Viewers are read-only across integrations and automations by default
